text:
The substantive prior findings are addressed: `IsPathHomotopyTrivial` no longer cites the nonexistent `paths_homotopic_iff_loops_nullhomotopic`, the module/strategy text now uses `instDiscreteTopology` and `TubeData.isOpen`, and `toPath_homotopic_of_joinedIn_slsc` no longer carries a numbered proof sketch. `IsSimplyConnected U` (referenced in `IsPathHomotopyTrivial`'s docstring) is a real Mathlib predicate on sets — valid.

One stale cross-reference remains. Verified: the proof-strategy block's step 6 names `(discreteTopology)` while every sibling parenthetical (steps 4–5) names the actual declaration; the real instance is `Path.Homotopic.Quotient.instDiscreteTopology`.

TAUCETI-VERDICT-bdb06b285bcf3f6552664df1

```json
{
  "verdict": "request_changes",
  "summary": "Documentation is otherwise accurate and complete after the prior fixes. One stale cross-reference remains in the proof-strategy comment.",
  "findings": [
    { "file": "TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/FundamentalGroupoid/SemilocallySimplyConnected.lean", "line": "579",
      "issue": "Proof-strategy step 6 names the declaration `(discreteTopology)`; no such declaration exists. Sibling parentheticals (steps 4-5) name real decls.",
      "fix": "Rename to `Path.Homotopic.Quotient.instDiscreteTopology` (the actual instance at line 932).",
      "evidence": "grep: line 579 `(discreteTopology)`; line 932 declares `instDiscreteTopology`; `discreteTopology` is only `discreteTopology_iff_isOpen_singleton`, not a quotient declaration." }
  ]
}
```

verdict_obj.summary: Documentation is otherwise accurate and complete after the prior fixes. One stale cross-reference remains in the proof-strategy comment.

findings.issue: Proof-strategy step 6 names the declaration `(discreteTopology)`; no such declaration exists. Sibling parentheticals (steps 4-5) name real decls.
findings.fix: Rename to `Path.Homotopic.Quotient.instDiscreteTopology` (the actual instance at line 932).
findings.evidence: grep: line 579 `(discreteTopology)`; line 932 declares `instDiscreteTopology`; `discreteTopology` is only `discreteTopology_iff_isOpen_singleton`, not a quotient declaration.
